dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION OAB in Adults : The recommended starting dosage is 4 mg orally once daily. Based upon individual response and tolerability, increase to the maximum dosage of 8 mg once daily. ( 2.1 ) Adult Patients with Renal Impairment : Refer to the full prescribing information for recommended dosage. ( 2.3 ) Dosage Modifications Due to Strong CYP3A4 Inhibitors : Refer to the full prescribing information for recommended dosage. ( 2.5 ) Administration : Swallow whole with liquid. Do
